The OS for
Construciton
Supply Chains

Stop managing spreadsheets and start orchestrating your site. Intellibyld uses a Construction-Trained SLM to turn fragmented logistics into Autonomous Execution, keeping your project on schedule and your carbon footprint on target.

Request Free DemoTry For Free
What is Intellibyld?
The AI Powered OS that orchestrates your 
construction supply chain through
  Autonomous Execution

Construction-Trained Intelligence

Our Small Language Model(SLM) is fine-tuned specifically on construction data, allowing it to understand the deep nuances of project logistics and make high-stakes autonomous decisions.

Real-Time Digital Twins

We build a live virtual map of every material's journey. Spot threats and identify opportunities before they disrupt your site, keeping your schedule perfectly in sync.

Agentic Workflow Automation

Seamlessly integrate with BIM, ERP, and PM software. Our Agentic AI automates RFQs, shipment tracking, and bidding evaluations so your team can focus on building.

Digital Twins
A Living Digital Twin of your entire project Supply Chain

Traditional BIM models are static snapshots. Intellibyld creates a dynamic, virtual replica of your construction supply chain that evolves in real-time. By linking every material movement to your master project schedule, we eliminate the “Integration Trap” and ensure your digital model perfectly mirrors your physical site reality.

Learn more

Real-time Awareness

Live tracking of every asset from the factory gate to the Construction site.

Predictive Resilience

Identify supply chain threats and potential bottlenecks before they disrupt your site execution.

Autonomous Decisions

Agentic AI that doesn't just flag delays but actively re-routes shipments and manages RFQs.

Carbon Accountability

Automated monitoring of material related embodied carbon emissions based on actual delivery data.

Autonomous Execution Layer
Agents that don’t just track- They Execute

Stop wasting your team's potential on the "Integration Trap." While legacy systems require manual data entry and constant oversight, Intellibyld’s Agentic AI acts as a tireless digital workforce. It autonomously manages the complex coordination between your BIM models, ERP data, and thousands of supplier interactions, making real-time decisions that keep your project on track.

  • Autonomous Logistics: Freeing teams for site execution.
  • Proactive Neutralization: Stopping threats early.
  • Zero Friction: Fast-tracking RFQs and shipments.
Learn more
